title: hymenophyllum glebarium
intro: Hymenophyllum glebarium, also known as the golden cloak fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum glebarium include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and scrapes, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve headaches. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
